SEARCH
Package org.flossware.jeventbus.api

Interface MessageBus

All Known Implementing Classes:
InMemoryMessageBus
public interface MessageBus
Publish/subscribe message bus for inter-application communication. Enables applications to send and receive messages through named topics.

Example usage:


 // Subscribe to messages
 Subscription sub = messageBus.subscribe("events", message -> {
     System.out.println("Received: " + new String(message.getPayload()));
 });

 // Publish a message
 Message msg = Message.builder()
     .topic("events")
     .payload("Hello".getBytes())
     .build();
 messageBus.publish("events", msg);

 // Unsubscribe when done
 messageBus.unsubscribe(sub);
See Also:
  • Message
  • MessageHandler
  • Subscription

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    publish(String topic, Message message)
    Publishes a message to all subscribers of the specified topic.
    Subscription
    subscribe(String topic, MessageHandler handler)
    Subscribes to receive messages on the specified topic.
    void
    unsubscribe(Subscription subscription)
    Unsubscribes from receiving messages.

  • Method Details

    • publish

      void publish(String topic, Message message)
      Publishes a message to all subscribers of the specified topic. Message delivery is asynchronous and does not block the publisher.
      Parameters:
      topic - the topic to publish to
      message - the message to publish

    • subscribe

      Subscription subscribe(String topic, MessageHandler handler)
      Subscribes to receive messages on the specified topic. The handler will be invoked asynchronously for each received message.
      Parameters:
      topic - the topic to subscribe to
      handler - the handler to invoke for received messages
      Returns:
      a subscription that can be used to unsubscribe

    • unsubscribe

      void unsubscribe(Subscription subscription)
      Unsubscribes from receiving messages. After this call, the handler will no longer receive messages.
      Parameters:
      subscription - the subscription to cancel
